title: Resolve orphaned T-Beam Supreme puck target
description: lichen/apps/puck/boards/tbeam_supreme.conf and .overlay declare a stub target, but Zephyr 3.7 has no canonical T-Beam Supreme board definition in this tree. Add and validate an explicitly approved canonical board mapping or retire the stale fragments; do not present the stub as supported.
acceptance_criteria: tbeam_supreme has a valid canonical Zephyr board target with puck build/runtime validation, or its stale puck fragments are explicitly retired.
